block_00: Open Trading Network project is closed
block_02: We’d like to inform you that the Open Trading Network (OTN) Team has started the process of closing the project. The project will be completely closed on the 25th of April 2019.
block_03: This means that OTN will no longer be supported on the IQ Option platform after this date. We recommend you withdraw or sell your OTN coins in order not to lose them.
block_04:
Thank you for your understanding!
IQ Option Team
